title: INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administrative offices for Oregon’s statewide system of county ODHS offices serving adults and children with intellectual or developmental disabilities. Provides information about available services and directs callers to their local office. County Community Developmental Disability Program (CDDP) offices determine eligibility. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Children and adults with intellectual/developmental disabilities, and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 945-5811 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 945-5811 TTY/TTD (800) 282-8096 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Administrative Entities * Disabilities Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON DISABILITIES COMMISSION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S INTENSIVE IN-HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON HOME CARE COMMISSION INFORMATION SERVICES - BRAIN INJURY PROGRAM TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - GENERAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES
